hindi_hinglish: Bhaiya/didi, inko chakkar aur sir dard ho raha hai. Kya aap guide ya medical help bula sakte hain?

english_intent: Ask for nearest safe halt before dark
hindi_hinglish: Andhera ho raha hai. Sabse nazdeek surakshit rukne ki jagah kidhar hai?

english_intent: Ask where to refill safe water
hindi_hinglish: Peene ka paani bharne ki safe jagah kahan milegi? Hum paani treat karke piyenge.
polite_register_note: Does not assume water is safe untreated.

hindi_hinglish: Aapka rate samajh gaya. Kya aap thoda kam kar sakte hain? Hum current rate local counter/guide se bhi confirm kar lenge.
Hamare group ke log alag ho gaye hain. Last unhe yahan dekha tha, is samay ke aas-paas. Kripya guide/authority ko bata dijiye.
